Q2 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which one of the following is used to determine relative acceleration of the linkage in single slider crank mechanism?

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Klein’s construction is used to determine relative acceleration and velocity of the linkages in single slider crank mechanism using velocity polygon and acceleration polygon.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q4 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

In a single slider crank mechanism, the crank length is 40 mm and length of connecting rod is 160 mm. The crank is rotating with a uniform angular speed of 1200 rpm. The magnitude of angular acceleration of connecting rod at an instant when the crank has turned through an angle of 40° from the inner dead centre is

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Q5 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which one of the following inversion is obtained in single slider crank mechanism when connecting rod is fixed?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
Inversions of single slider crank mechanism:
1. When cylinder is fixed
• Reciprocating engine
• Reciprocating compressor
2. When crank is fixed
• Whitworth quick return mechanism
• Gnome engine
3. When connecting rod is fixed
• Crank and slotted lever quick return mechanism
• Oscillatory cylinder engine
4. When piston or slider is fixed
• Hand pump
• Pendulum pump

Q6 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A car uses Ackermann steering gear mechanism, has wheel base 2.5 m and width of the front  axle 1.25 m. If the angle turned by the inner front wheel is 20° then the angle turned by the outer front wheel for perfect steering is _______ degrees. (Round off to two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 17.12 (17.00 - 17.30)
Solution

17.12 (17.00 - 17.30)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The centre distance between two mating gears with base circle diameter 120 mm and 200 mm and pressure angle 20° is ______ mm. (Round off to 1 decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 170.3 (170.0 - 170.6)
Solution

170.3 (170.0 - 170.6)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Two mating full depth spur gears has pressure angle 20° and gear ratio 4. The minimum number of teeth required on the smaller gear to avoid interference is ______. (Answer in integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 16 (16 - 16)
Solution

16 (16 - 16)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Q14 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

In a crank and slotted lever mechanism used in a shaper machine, the distance between centre of rotation of the crank and the centre of oscillation of the slotted lever is 500 mm. If the radius of the crank is 300 mm, the ratio of the time of cutting stroke to the time of return stroke is ______ (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 2.39 (2.37 - 2.41)
Solution

2.39 (2.37 - 2.41)

NAT
Correct answer: 10.00 (9.95 - 10.05)
Solution

10.00 (9.95 - 10.05)

(Answer in integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 36 (36 - 36)
Solution

36 (36 - 36)

Q17 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A spring-mass damper system with mass m = 6 kg, spring constant s = 15 kN/m is kept at a plane inclined at 30° with horizontal as shown in the figure.

The mass is subjected to an external force F(t) = 40 sin(30t), where F is in Newton and t is in seconds. At resonance, the amplitude of vibration is 20 mm. Assuming frictionless contact of the mass with the ground, which of the above statement(s) is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, d)
